shell.title: Find the Fear Triggers
shell.subtitle: Cut the links into clues and spot the real and fake!
shell.coach: Check the domain. Reveal the parts. Use the rule.
shell.tutorialStep1: Listen to the full scene before answering.
shell.tutorialStep2: Character messages appear first, then the voice reads each line.
shell.tutorialStep3: Choose the safest answers in each activity.
shell.tutorialStep4: Use mute, restart, language, and fullscreen from the top bar anytime.
shell.languageSubtitle: Switch the interface language for the activity shell.
shell.rotateMessage: This activity is best experienced in landscape mode.
shell.sceneLocked: Listen to the full scene first.
shell.tryAgain: Not quite. Look for the warning signs.
shell.tried: Good try. You can continue, or change your answer before moving on.
shell.redFlagFound: Good spot. That is a red flag.
shell.complete: Activity complete. Zara and friends are scam-spotting pros now.
shell.suspiciousMessageCopy: You won Rs 50,000 plus a phone. Pay Rs 299 to claim in 2 hours.
shell.introTitle: Can you spot the offer scam?
shell.introBody: Join Zara, Simran, Tej, and Avi. Listen to each scene, then solve the scam-safety challenge that unlocks.
shell.sortTip: Drag or tap a card, then choose the correct zone.
shell.quizCoach: Answer one question at a time. Pick the safest option before continuing.
shell.mythSubtitle: Decide whether each common belief is safe or misleading.
shell.mythCoach: Scam myths can sound believable. Bust the myth, then read the fact.
shell.matchPrompt: Match each clue to the correct warning sign.
shell.completeBody: You helped the group slow down, check the signs, and avoid too-good-to-be-true offers.
shell.reportNote: For serious cyber fraud in India, report at cybercrime.gov.in or call 1930.
shell.timeUp: Time is up. Review the safest answer.
shell.mythSpeakerPrompt: Listen carefully and decide if this idea is safe or misleading.
shell.safeBubbleWrongDetail: That is a safe action, not a red flag. In this round, pop only suspicious signs from the message.
shell.sortWrongDetail: The card "{card}" was placed in {picked}, but it belongs in {correct}. Read whether it asks you to trust, pay, rush, or pause.
shell.matchWrongDetail: The clue "{clue}" matches "{sign}". Match the action in the clue to the exact warning sign.

tutorial.title: How to Play
steps: Look at each phone screen carefully.
Tap Real or Scam for every example.
The app name does not prove the message is safe.
Use the clues: unknown sender, urgency, pay first, and too big.
